situations: A customer asks where to find rice, lentils, or fish.

A patient is describing symptoms for themselves or their child.
A patient asks when they should come back for a follow-up.
A patient asks to see a female doctor and asks if insurance is needed.

A worker calls to say they will be late and explains why.
